subject: Cart closes in ~24hrs
body:
You have less than 24 hours to grab your 200 copies of $100M Money Models PLUS the mountain of book bonuses.

You can see what they are full breakdown here: RECAP.ACQ.COM

OR if you prefer to read, I attached a letter there that explains everything.

Alex

PS - I'm taking the offer down for good in just 24hrs. So grab the books and claim your insane bonuses here. RECAP.ACQ.COM
